message:
feat(process_triage): add ProcessTriageProvider trait and versioned envelope

Introduces a provider abstraction for process triage classification,
enabling pluggable classification strategies beyond the built-in
heuristic classifier:

- ProcessTriageProvider trait with classify(), build_plan(), and
  build_envelope() methods. Default implementations delegate to
  build_plan_with_classifier() so providers only need to implement
  classify() at minimum.

- HeuristicProcessTriageProvider as the default implementation that
  wraps the existing module-level classify() function.

- ProcessTriageEnvelope<T> for versioned integration payloads with
  schema_version and provider provenance fields. Uses the
  PROCESS_TRIAGE_SCHEMA_VERSION_V1 constant for compatibility tracking.

- Refactored build_plan() to delegate through the provider trait while
  maintaining backward compatibility. Added build_plan_with_provider()
  and build_plan_envelope() as explicit entry points.

- Internal classify_tree() now accepts a classifier function parameter
  instead of calling the module-level classify() directly, enabling
  the provider abstraction.

- Derived PartialEq/Eq on ClassifiedProcess, TriagePlan, and
  ProcessContext for testability. Added Serialize/Deserialize and Debug
  derives on ProcessContext for integration use.

- Added TriageInput type alias at module level for ergonomic API surface.

Includes three tests: provider-vs-direct parity, build_plan equivalence,
and envelope schema/provider field validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
